title: Bedtime Story for Kids | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
WOOF WHOOSH! The moon puppy tiptoes across fluffy clouds!
A calming bedtime story for kids with Benny and a sleepy moon puppy.
Perfect for toddlers who enjoy cozy cartoon stories before sleep.
Gentle American English narration for ages 2-8.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
